title: Verification gate bypassed — 103 unchecked checklist items vs COMPLETE completion claim
evidence: checklist.md has 103 unchecked [ ] vs 3 checked [x] across all P0 verification items (Phase B scenarios, Phase C root playbook, Phase D sandbox harness, Phase E gates G1-G7, closeout). implementation-summary.md:55 declares Status: COMPLETE (~95%).
recommendation: Do NOT claim COMPLETE until all P0 checkboxes are [x] with traceable evidence. Current state warrants completion_pct ~50.

title: SC-001 references 25 scenarios but REQ-001 and reality = 23
evidence: SC-001: '25 scenario .md files exist' but REQ-001 says 23, mode reduction removed DOC-337 + DOC-343, and only 23 files exist on disk.

title: 002 IMS internal contradiction: completion_pct 70 vs body COMPLETE (~95%)
recommendation: Reconcile to single consistent value; if checklist mostly unchecked, completion_pct ≤50.

title: 001 IMS internal contradiction: completion_pct 99 vs body ~30%
recommendation: Update body to reflect current state; set consistent completion_pct.

title: 001 IMS references deleted YAML modes (confirm/apply/apply-confirm)
evidence: Lines 96-104 describe pending confirm/apply/apply-confirm YAML variants. Mode reduction deleted 21 mode YAMLs; single-mode design uses bare doctor_*.yaml only.
recommendation: Rewrite remaining-work section to reflect single-mode design.

title: 002 spec lists 001 sibling as Complete — contradicts 001 own status
recommendation: Update to accurate status like (Implemented; docs pending).

title: All 23 scenarios structurally correct but zero executed end-to-end
evidence: 23 wrappers invoke canonical /doctor:* commands 1:1. handover.md confirms 'Phase NOT Completed: actual scenario execution (zero scenarios run end-to-end).' No runtime verification evidence exists.
recommendation: Do not claim verification gates for scenarios without runtime evidence. Mark as DEFERRED with fixture/Docker dependencies.

title: 002 IMS G3 validation report stale — strict validate now passes
evidence: IMS reports G3 fails with 4 error categories. Current validate.sh --strict exits 0 cleanly.
recommendation: Update G3 to PASS; remove cross-packet template caveat.

title: 002 handover vs IMS validation-status cross-file inconsistency
evidence: Handover claims PASSED for G3/G4; IMS says G3 ⚠️ G4 ⚠️. Both pass now but docs disagree.
recommendation: Align IMS validation table with handover and current state.

detail: 001 command names cross-reference correctly to 002 scenario invocations (1:1 verified). No runtime execution performed.
103 unchecked items in 002 checklist. No per-scenario, harness, or gate verification evidence.
Doctor commands exist as standalone slash commands; no @doctor agent definition found; scenarios reference commands directly, not via agent dispatch.
resource-map.md lists 76 refs; glob confirms 23 scenarios + 23 wrappers + 5 commands + 5 YAMLs exist.
23 .md files follow 5-section template; 23 .sh wrappers invoke canonical commands 1:1. Zero scenarios executed end-to-end — capability unverified.

reason: P0-001: 103 unchecked verification gate items with COMPLETE claim — primary quality gate bypassed. 5 P1 findings document significant documentation-code drift.
